enGB:
At 6th level, a kineticist’s study of her body and the elemental forces that course through it allow her to form an internal buffer to store extra energy.
When she would otherwise accept burn, a kineticist can spend energy from her buffer to avoid accepting 1 point of burn. She can do it once per day. Kineticist gets an additional use of this ability at levels 11 and 16.
Internal Buffer is active, mitigating 1 point of burn from any source.
